# LZX → Declare coverage (oracle snapshot)

*Generated by `node tools/lzx-transpile.mjs ../openlaszlo-5.0 --compile --report`
over the 1,816-file OpenLaszlo 5.0 corpus. This is goal C's output: a
frequency-ranked map of what LZX the layer cannot yet express, re-prioritizing
`design/declare-language.md` §13. Regenerate after each map-rule change; a drop
in `compiled-clean` below the baseline is a regression.*

## Headline (after the library-mapping pass, 2026-07-21)

- **transpiled: 1228 / 1816** (emit a structurally valid `.declare`)
- **compiled-clean: 485 / 1816** (that `.declare` also passes `compile()` with
  typecheck off) — up from the Phase-1 baseline of 408 (+77; the attribute-drop
  lets more mapped components compile).
- **library-root (class-only): 454** — `<library>`-root files legitimately have
  no App, so they emit no runnable program. NOT failures; a separate bucket.

## What changed vs. the Phase-1 snapshot

Phase-1 reported `unknown-tag = 11,859` — but ~70% was noise (documentation
prose walked inside `<doc>`, `<dataset>` data rows, and language constructs
miscounted as components). This pass corrected the accounting and mapped the
schema-backed components:

- **`unknown-tag`: 11,859 → 940** (−92%). It now means only genuine strays.
- **`library-component` (new): 3,369** — the honest, dominant signal: real OL UI
  components with no Declare equivalent (`window`, `menuitem`, `textlistitem`,
  `scrollbar`, …). This is the ranked "what to build in the Declare library next."
- The noise moved to accurate categories: `modules` 1,837, `resources-and-fonts`
  731, `documentation` 180, `dataset-body` 282, `event-decl` 325, `script-block`
  117, `custom-setter` 109, `rpc` 101, `styling` 33.
- `unmapped-attr` (new): 2,902 — attributes dropped from mapped schema-backed
  components (OL attrs with no Declare slot); the drop is what protects
  compiled-clean from regressing.

## Gaps by category (descending)

| count | s13Ref | reading |
|------:|--------|---------|
|  3369 | `library-component` | **real OL components with no Declare home** — the ranked "build next" list (window/menuitem/textlistitem/scrollbar/…). |
|  2902 | `unmapped-attr` | OL attributes/handlers dropped from mapped schema components (no slot / undeclared event). |
|  1837 | `modules` | `<include>`/`<library>`/`<import>` — the module model (§13). |
|   940 | `unknown-tag` | genuine strays only (was 11,859). |
|   731 | `resources-and-fonts` | `<resource>` sprites + `<font>`/`<face>` (§13). |
|   516 | `constraint-timing` | `$once{}`/`$always`/`$immediately` (§13's proposed `once`). |
|   395 | `datapath-xpath` | XPath datapaths (predicates/`text()`/qualified) with no `:path` surface. |
|   325 | `event-decl` | `<event>` declarations. |
|   282 | `dataset-body` | `<dataset>` XML data (not yet JSON-converted). |
|   180 | `documentation` | `<doc>` prose blocks (skipped). |
|   117 | `script-block` | `<script>` blocks (not yet translated to `script { }`). |
|   110 | `state-form` | `<state>` (real translation deferred). |
|   109 | `custom-setter` | `<setter>` (§13). |
|   101 | `rpc` | `<remotecall>`/`<param>` (§13). |
|    76 | `subscription-source` | `reference="classroot.ms"` path sources. |
|    54 | `imperative-data-mutation` | `<datapointer>` (§13). |
|    51 | `attr-change-handler` | `on<attribute>` change events (→ constraints). |
|    40 | `typed-method` | AS3 `:Type` param annotations dropped. |
|    33 | `styling` | `<stylesheet>` (not yet translated). |
|    10 | `dynamic-body` | `setAttribute` with computed name / non-standard args. |
|     6 | `animation-choreography` | `<animatorgroup>`/`<animator>` inside a state. |
|     2 | `mixins` | `<mixin>`/`with=`. |

## Priority read for §13

1. **Component library** (`library-component`, 3,369) is now the honest top lever
   — author the high-weight OL components in Declare (`window`, `menuitem`,
   `textlistitem`, `scrollbar`). Each mapped/authored component converts its slice
   directly to transpiled+compiled-clean.
2. **Module model** (`modules`, 1,837) — `<include>`/`<library>` is the backbone
   of real apps; the 454 library-root files unlock once it exists.
3. **Resources & fonts** (731) and **constraint-timing / `once`** (516) remain the
   next settled-surface gaps.
4. **Deferred translations** already surfaced as their own tickets: `script-block`
   (117 → `script { }`), `styling` (33 → Declare stylesheet), `custom-setter`
   (109 → `set x(v)`), `dataset-body` (282 → JSON), and the library-class input
   components (checkbox/radio/… → per-component attribute aliasing).
